regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Hastings typically charge $85–$120/hr. Hawke's Bay rates are similar to Napier. Emergency callouts add $75–$130.

businesses.name: ST Plumbing & Gasfitting
businesses.known_for: Gas (LPG and natural gas) installation and repairs, gas appliance servicing and residential plumbing maintenance and renovations; 24 years experience.

businesses.name: Aplus Plumbing and Gas
businesses.known_for: New house builds, bespoke renovations, emergency repairs, routine maintenance and water filtration across CHB, Hastings and Napier.

businesses.known_for: Friendly and reliable certifying plumber and drainlayer for quick maintenance jobs through to full new builds across Napier, Hastings and CHB.
